description: A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this fabulous belt from roxy is made of 100% polyurethane for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, wear this fashionable belt around those stylish skinnies!Length at largest setting: 90 cmMade of 100% polyurethane for durability and styleEmbossed block designTang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
